user.title: Add Warema EWFS cover
user.description: Select the type of cover you want to add.

single.title: Single shutter
single.description: Map the five logical commands to ESPHome button entities and configure travel times.

group.title: Fan-out group
group.description: Select the single-shutter cover entities that belong to this group.

native_group.title: Native remote group
native_group.description: Map the five group command buttons and select the member covers whose state will be updated.

send_command.name: Send EWFS command
send_command.description: Trigger one logical command on a shutter or group (mapped to button entities).

command.name: Command name
command.description: One of open, close, stop, tilt_up, tilt_down.

set_cover_position_and_tilt.name: Set cover position and tilt
set_cover_position_and_tilt.description: Move to a cover position first, then apply the tilt target.

position.name: Cover position
position.description: Target cover position in percent (0–100). 0 = fully closed, 100 = fully open.

tilt_position.name: Tilt position
tilt_position.description: Target tilt position in percent (0–100). 0 = fully closed, 100 = fully open.

set_cover_position_and_tilt_step.name: Set cover position and tilt step
set_cover_position_and_tilt_step.description: Move to a cover position first, then apply a discrete tilt step (0–6).

position.name: Cover position
position.description: Target cover position in percent (0–100). 0 = fully closed, 100 = fully open.

tilt_step.name: Tilt step
tilt_step.description: Target tilt step (0–6, where 0 = vertical and 6 = horizontal).

simulate_command.name: Simulate external command
simulate_command.description: Update cover position tracking as if a command was received from an external remote, without sending any hardware command.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command detected from the external remote.

simulate_set_tilt_position.name: Simulate set tilt position
simulate_set_tilt_position.description: Set the tilt position directly without sending any hardware command.

force_move.name: Force move
force_move.description: Force open or close a cover regardless of its current tracked position. Useful when tracked state has drifted from the actual physical state.

command.name: Command
command.description: Force open or close the cover.
